text: This chapter may be cited as the Houston Pilots Licensing and Regulatory Act.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 66. Houston Pilots Licensing & Regul. Act
##### § 66.001 — Short Title

This chapter may be cited as the Houston Pilots Licensing and Regulatory Act.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter may be cited as the Houston Pilots Licensing and Regulatory Act.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
